title: BLUELIGHT RAT: Executable Download via Graph API
description: Detects executable or DLL files dropped in temporary directories by processes connected to Microsoft Graph API. BLUELIGHT downloads tools from OneDrive and stages them in Temp/AppData.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and 'Event ID' = 11 and ('Target Filename' like '%\Temp\%.exe' or 'Target Filename' like '%\Temp\%.dll' or 'Target Filename' like '%\AppData\%.exe' or 'Target Filename' like '%\AppData\%.dll' or 'Target Filename' like '%\Temp\%.scr' or 'Target Filename' like '%\Temp\%.bat') | stats count by 'Host Name (Server)', 'Process Name', 'Target Filename'
splunk_original: index=sysmon EventCode=11 TargetFilename IN ("*\\Temp\\*.exe","*\\AppData\\*.exe","*\\Temp\\*.dll") | join Image [search index=sysmon EventCode=3 DestinationHostname="graph.microsoft.com"] | table _time, Image, TargetFilename, DestinationHostname
